members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: An accessible label for the breadcrumb navigation.

members.name: handleSlotChange
members.description:
We want each breadcrumb item to have its own shadow DOM to allow so that we can provide consistent styling regardless of how the breadcrumb item
is rendered (e.g., via the prop-based API with made-breadcrumb-item or via the slotted content API with a custom link component). To do this, we need
to assign a unique slot name for each breadcrumb item (and its separators, if any). Since we also want to support dynamic addition of breadcrumb items,
we can't rely on a static set of slot names. Instead, we need to dynamically assign slot names to each breadcrumb item whenever the default slot changes
(e.g., when a breadcrumb items is added).

(Note that currently, dynamically removal is not supported in this implementation, as that would likely require a more complex implementation that involves a
MutationObserver to detect removed breadcrumb items and re-assign slot names accordingly. However, we do support dynamic addition of breadcrumb items, which
is likely the more common use case.)

default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits. However, if you're using `target` to point to a

setting the attribute to an empty string or a value of your choice, respectively.

members.name: noDismiss
members.description:
When set, the drawer can only be closed by an action inside it.
Backdrop clicks, Escape key, and swipe gestures are ignored.

members.name: _dragBaseTransform
members.description: Panel's computed translateX/Y at the moment a drag gesture begins.

members.name: _pendingCapture
members.description: Deferred pointer capture: set on pointerdown, applied only when drag is confirmed.

members.name: _applyDragTransform
members.description:
Applies a real-time drag transform while the gesture is in progress.
The drawer is always at the bottom, so only the Y axis is relevant.
Dragging down (positive dy) moves toward the close position.

Returns `true` when the gesture is on-axis so callers can call
`e.preventDefault()` to suppress native scroll.

members.name: _finishDrag
members.description:
Called on touch-end / pointer-up.  Decides whether to complete the
gesture (snap open / close) or snap back, then hands control back to the
CSS transition system by removing `--dragging`.

events.description: Emitted when the user attempts to close the drawer (backdrop click, Escape key, or swipe). Call `event.preventDefault()` to cancel. The event detail is `{ source: 'backdrop' | 'escape' | 'swipe' }`.

members.description:
The validation message displayed from a native error via
`reportValidity()`.

members.name: error
members.description:
Gets or sets whether or not the text field is in a visually invalid state.

This error state overrides the error state controlled by
`reportValidity()`.

members.name: errorText
members.description:
The error message that replaces supporting text when `error` is true. If
`errorText` is an empty string, then the supporting text will continue to
show.

This error message overrides the error message displayed by
`reportValidity()`.

members.name: success
members.description:
Gets or sets an explicit visually valid state. Can be used as part of
a manual vaidation process.

The error state returned by `reportValidity()` will override this.

members.name: successText
members.description:
The success message that replaces supporting text when `success` is true.
If `errorText` is an empty string, then the supporting text will continue to
show.

The message returned by `reportValidity()` will override this.

declarations.description:
A `ReactiveController` that provides single selection behaviour,
similar to native `<input type="radio">` selection.

To use, elements should add the controller and call
`radioController.handleCheckedChange()` in a getter/setter. This must
be synchronous to match native behavior.

attributes.name: reverse
attributes.description: When true reverses the order of the component, putting the label before the toggle.
